source: Learning Ansible with Rocky - Ansible Intermediate: Conditionals

questions.q: Which statement makes a task run only under a condition?
questions.why: The when statement gates a task on a condition.

questions.q: Behind a `when:`, do the variables need double braces?
options: No, because when is a Jinja2 expression
questions.why: when values are already Jinja2 expressions, so the double braces are omitted.

questions.q: When `when:` is written as a YAML list of conditions, how are they combined?
questions.why: A list of conditions under when is a logical AND.

questions.q: How do you combine OR and AND within a single when expression?
options: Group them with parentheses, e.g. (a and b) or (c and d)
questions.why: Conditions can be grouped with parentheses across lines.

questions.q: Which module gathers information about a path (existence, is-a-directory) for a when test?
questions.why: stat registers values like directory.stat.exists and directory.stat.isdir.

questions.q: How do you test that a boolean fact is NOT true in a when list?
How do you guard against a variable being undefined before using it?
options: when: myboolean is defined and myboolean
questions.why: `is defined` avoids execution errors when a variable may be missing.
